blockingIssues.description: internal/rpc/api.go triggerDeploy treats io.EOF from json.Decoder.Decode as malformed JSON and returns 400, which breaks existing empty-body POST behavior that should default commit to "main".

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/architecture.md package map to reflect internal/shared/pguuid as the UUID/pgtype conversion helper location.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a mission-authoring rule that feature requirements should avoid relying on edits to gitignored files (or explicitly document expected validation/commit behavior for them).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature fnd-dead-code-stale-refs required CLAUDE.md edits while .gitignore excludes CLAUDE.md, so commit-based scrutiny could not verify doc changes from git diff alone.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Prefer assertion evidence that checks behavior/semantic intent rather than exact helper symbol names when validating deduplication/refactors.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature fnd-unify-helpers consolidated metadata string casting into internal/shared/conv.String; contract evidence keyed only on metadataString|stringValue names would mark this valid refactor as failing.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit handling guidance for requirements involving gitignored files (whether to modify locally only, produce alternate evidence, and how to report in handoff).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature fnd-dead-code-stale-refs transcript showed attempted forced add/rollback churn around CLAUDE.md because procedure lacked a gitignored-file path.
